nasb.text: There is another who testifies of Me, and I know that the testimony which He gives about Me is true.

esv.text: There is another who bears witness about me, and I know that the testimony that he bears about me is true.

cnv.text: 然而另有一位為我作證的，我知道他為我作的見證是真的。

ccb.text: 然而，有别的人给我做见证，我知道他为我做的见证是真实的。

csbs.text: 为我做见证的另有一位，并且我知道，他为我做的见证是有效的。
